headline: Will Launch of AI-Native VPN for Agents Change Gen Digital's (GEN) AI Cyber Safety Narrative?
summary: In late April 2026, Gen Digital launched VPN for Agents, an AI-native VPN tailored for autonomous AI agents, and expanded Norton AI Agent Protection within Norton 360 to monitor and secure agent activity in real time. By extending its Agent Trust Hub into communication security and enforcement, Gen is positioning itself as a core consumer “trust layer” for everyday AI agent usage across sensitive digital workflows. Next, we’ll examine how Gen’s new VPN for AI agents could reshape its...
